Functionality:

I =0 -> V = VCS/2 (Vcs + VMCU when Q9 is ON)

Analog input for battery voltage measurement.
V-BATM = VBAT/2 when Q6 is ON

Input voltage from solar panel or Power supply.
V_PANEL = VIn/11
MAX VIn + 30V. MIN VIN - to be specified and tested at bring up.

HI - Power enable
LOW - Power Disable
Enables the output switch to turn on output

Controls current reference voltage for LED1
Controls current reference voltage for LED2
Enables/Disables PMOS transistor when taking battery voltage reading.

Analog input for discharge current measurement from current sense amplifier
Bootstrap Loader Receiver Pin. Used during programming
Bootstrap Loader Transmit Pin. Used during programming.
Analog input for voltge measurement for LED output 2
Analog input for voltge measurement for LED output 1
